notes: These records mix observed location and movement with some ambiguous shorthand.
One item says 'up to 1pm home' without a clear start time, so it is retained as a contextual note rather than a bounded segment.
Google Maps may sometimes represent planning behavior rather than actual movement, as noted in user heuristics.
